name: honcho
tagline: Configures and drives Honcho cross-session memory (peers, observation, dialectic reasoning, context budgets) for Hermes agent profiles.
verdict: Thorough, deterministic reference with stated defaults, good multi-profile guidance, and a solid troubleshooting section. Weak spots: an unpinned honcho-ai dependency, no stated scope exclusions, and a dense single-file reference that could split bulky tables into on-demand docs.

highlights.summary: prerequisites.pip lists 'honcho-ai' with no version pin — well-known package but unpinned.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body despite related_skills sibling (hermes-agent).
432-line single file with large CLI/config/tool reference tables kept inline instead of split into references/.
